text: The environment is dark, quiet, and almost foreboding, as if I’m lingering in an unoccupied office late at night. There is a sense of unease and curiosity—perhaps I should not be here, but the intrigue pulls me forward. Time slows; each shadow and every silent computer screen is loaded with a sense of anticipation. I am alert, contemplative, and a little apprehensive, surrounded by the faint evidence of innovation (R+D) without the hum of human presence.
